topic: Cloud Dataflow and BigQuery ETL pipeline
question_text: How would you design a real-time ETL pipeline for streaming analytics using Cloud Dataflow and BigQuery?
hook_text: Unlock real-time insights! Build a scalable streaming ETL pipeline with Dataflow and BigQuery on GCP.
cta_text: Master real-time analytics on GCP. Follow for more interview prep!

answer_sections.title: Ingestion & Processing
answer_sections.text: Ingest streaming data via Pub/Sub. Dataflow pipelines process, transform, and enrich data in real-time efficiently using Apache Beam.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Stream data with Pub/Sub. Dataflow pipelines process, transform, and enrich it efficiently in real-time.

answer_sections.title: Transformation & Storage
answer_sections.text: Dataflow transforms data, ensuring schema compliance. Load into BigQuery for scalable, cost-effective analytics and reporting. Optimizes queries with partitioning.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Dataflow transforms for schema compliance, loading into BigQuery. Ensures scalable, cost-effective analytics with optimized queries.

answer_sections.title: Observability & Management
answer_sections.text: Monitor pipeline health via Cloud Monitoring. Debug issues with Cloud Logging. Data Catalog for metadata management, ensuring compliance.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Monitor pipeline health with Cloud Monitoring. Debug using Cloud Logging. Data Catalog for metadata, compliance.

diagrams.title: Full Pipeline Observability
diagrams.dsl:
[[ETL Pipeline]] -- Metrics --> (Cloud Monitoring) 
 [[ETL Pipeline]] -- Logs --> (Cloud Logging) 
 [[ETL Pipeline]] -- Metadata --> [Data Catalog]
